microsoft_ft: Served as **technical quarterback** for Azure resilience validation, owning recovery executions end-to-end from kickoff to go-live and driving **$14M+ business impact** across SMB-to-enterprise accounts (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp).

Led **0→1 build** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining requirements and self-service scheduling that **cut operational toil 30%** and turned manual execution into a repeatable, scalable onboarding workflow.

Managed **distributed vendor partners** and cross-org stakeholders, assigning work, running structured QA reviews, and holding teams accountable to **45+ annual drills** while debugging issues and writing custom scripts hands-on.

Scaled team leverage by shipping an **internal AI agent** and restructuring planning workflows, cutting planning cycle time **39%** and raising drill capacity **21%** through process automation and continuous-improvement iteration.

Shaped the product roadmap toward intent-based YAML generation by running **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams to surface feature gaps and prioritize fixes with engineering.
Migrated documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool and enforced metadata standards, **cutting lookup time 83%** and improving data integrity for distributed users.

Ran discovery with **20+ service teams** to quantify **81 hours** of manual effort per region launch, building a roadmap to automate critical paths and reduce onboarding toil.
Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across **140+ teams**, enabling leadership to target high-impact automation gaps with data.
amazon_robotics: Delivered **zero downtime** across a **2,000+ unit** OS migration by defining strategy and mapping dependencies over **1,200+ stations** in a high-velocity rollout.
Facilitated Agile ceremonies and prioritized backlog to clear **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilizing the developer intake process under tight cycle deadlines.
Aligned IT, Operations, and Engineering to ship automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating deployment cycles **25%** and reducing manual release effort.
pro_painters: Grew job bookings **26%** by rebuilding the **CRM** scoping-and-invoicing lifecycle for **200+ monthly proposals** into a repeatable operational workflow.
Cut customer acquisition cost **13%** and lifted conversions **2.7%** via a digital-first go-to-market strategy across web and Google profile.
Analyzed **1,000+ project records** to surface margin leaks, improving leadership pricing models with data-driven profitability insights.

tailoring_notes: Mirrored JD vocab: technical quarterback, 0→1, customer health infrastructure, vendor QA, cycle time, adoption metrics.
Reframed Azure resilience work as high-volume technical migrations + onboarding to match Post-Sales SE scope.
